hooks.command: input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'college-backend/src/.*\.tsx?$'; then cd /home/ayyaz/projects/school_managment/college-system/college-backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE 'college-web/src/.*\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then cd /home/ayyaz/projects/school_managment/college-system/college-web && npx eslint "$file" --max-warnings 0 2>&1 | tail -15; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'college-backend/src'; then grep -n 'new PrismaClient()' "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo 'WARNING: Use shared prisma instance from src/config/database.ts instead' || true; fi
input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.env(\.local)?$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: edit .env files via your text editor, not Claude'; exit 2; fi

input=$(cat); file=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -q 'schema.prisma'; then echo 'REMINDER: After schema changes run: npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:generate in college-backend'; fi
